title: 200 x Strung Kraft Paper Bags (12 x 12 inch) – Brown Paper Bags for Food, Lunch, Gifts, Groceries, Sandwiches & Takeaway | Greaseproof & Eco-Friendly Fruit Bag | Recyclable Extra Large Brown Bag
features: ✔Perfectly Sized for Small Items: These 12x12 inches strung kraft paper bags are ideal for storing snacks, sweets, groceries, sandwich, or small food items without any mess. These bags can be used for lots of things, school lunches, picnics, takeaways, gift bags, party bags, sweet bags, food storage.
✔ Eco-Friendly and Recyclable: Made from biodegradable kraft paper, these extra large brown paper bags are a sustainable choice for packaging needs.
✔ Durable and Greaseproof: Designed to hold oily or moist items without tearing, perfect as carrier bags or delivery bag.
✔ Multipurpose Use: Great for lunches, small gift wrapping, party favors, or as takeaway bags for small servings like popcorn, biscuits, crisps.
✔ 100% Satisfaction: These bags go through multiple quality control measures to ensure you are completely happy with the item.
description: 💥 PREMIUM QUALITY - Our paper food bags are crafted with the finest materials to ensure superior strength and durability. They are made from high-quality 38 GSM brown kraft paper making them perfect for safely storing and carrying various food items. ⚡ VERSATILE DESIGN - These food bags are designed to meet the diverse needs of your customers. With their generous size and sturdy construction, they can accommodate a wide range of food items, including sandwiches, cookies, candies, fruits, and more. The flat-bottom design allows them to stand upright, providing convenience and ease of use. 🌎 ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY - Our strung kraft paper bags are an eco-conscious choice for your customers. Made from renewable and biodegradable materials, they are a sustainable alternative to traditional plastic bags. By using these brown bags, your customers can reduce their environmental impact and promote a greener future. ✔️ SECURE AND CONVENIENT - The bags feature a self-sealing design that ensures a secure closure, keeping the contents fresh and preventing any accidental spills. The sturdy construction of the bags offers reliable protection during transportation, making them ideal for takeout orders, food deliveries, and picnics. 💯 BRANDING OPPORTUNITY - The neutral, natural look of our kraft paper bags provides a perfect canvas for branding and customization. You can easily add your logo, company name, or promotional messages to the bags, allowing you to enhance your brand visibility and create a professional and cohesive look for your food business. But that's not all. Our Brown Kraft Paper Bags are also grease-resistant, allowing you to serve greasier items like fries, burgers, or pastries without worrying about oil stains. Whether you own a restaurant, café, bakery, or food truck, our Brown Kraft Paper Bags are the ideal packaging solution for your business. So why wait? Upgrade your food presentation and packaging with these versatile bags today!
